article.body_preview:
DHAKA, April 10, 2023 (BSS) - The cabinet today approved two daft bills, including the draft of the 'Production, Storage, Transfer, Transport, Supply, Distribution and Marketing of Food (Prevention of Harmful Activities) Bill-2023', with a provision of life term imprisonment for illegal hoarding of food.

The cabinet, with Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina in the chair, gave the final approval in a meeting held at Parliament Complex here.

The other bill is 'Bangladesh Dairy Board Bill, 2023'.

After

llm_connections.evidence_quote: disobeys any instructions of the government regarding stocking, he or she will be sentenced to life imprisonment
llm_connections.scope_justification: The bill targets storing amounts of foodstuff above government-prescribed limits (stocking), which directly pertains to inventory levels of food grains and warehouse utilization.

llm_connections.evidence_quote: proposed to constitute a new body named "Bangladesh Dairy Development Board" to oversee the dairy related matters
llm_connections.scope_justification: The provision establishes a national body to oversee dairy matters and bring commercial milk producers under its purview, directly addressing the dairy industry sector (Group).
